garble_letter_spaced_tracking.expected_behavior: Expanded-tracking 'IN WITNESS WHEREOF'; extract_text fallback re-inserts spaces -> garble. Confidence signal must fire (gap a).

garble_ligature_kern_pairs.expected_behavior: 2-3 char kern-pair chunks under the 6-single-glyph threshold; routes to ' '.join, undetected today. Confidence signal must fire (gap b).

garble_per_glyph_normal_advance.expected_behavior: Per-glyph signature overlay -- already handled on main (glyph-fragment detector). Regression anchor.

garble_spaced_nda_title_legit.expected_behavior: Legit 'N D A' spaced title. Must NOT be flagged as garble (guardrail).

neg_definitions_table_term_definition.expected_behavior: Term | definition table -- DELIBERATELY classified negative (see builder docstring). Must stay byte-identical.

neg_justified_large_interword.expected_behavior: Justified prose with wide inter-word gaps. Big whitespace must not read as a gutter.

neg_numbered_list_far_left_number.expected_behavior: Hanging-indent numbered list; lone left number must not be read as a column.

neg_right_aligned_page_number.expected_behavior: Footer text left + right-aligned page number on one baseline. Must stay as-is.

neg_signature_name_left_date_right.expected_behavior: 'Name: ___' left / 'Date: ___' right on one baseline. One logical line; must stay merged.

neg_single_col_wide_margins_centered_tit.expected_behavior: Single column, wide margins, centered title. Must NOT be split.

neg_two_cell_party_table.expected_behavior: Party name | registered address two-cell row. Must stay as-is.

pos_ctm_translated_overlap.expected_behavior: cm-translated block vs untranslated block; fix must honor the CTM so the two blocks do not collapse onto one baseline.

pos_stamped_executed_overlay.expected_behavior: 'EXECUTED' stamp on a body baseline; fix must not splice the stamp into the sentence.

pos_table_3col_5row.expected_behavior: 3-col x 5-row table; fix must keep cells from fusing across columns into one line.

pos_two_column_clean.expected_behavior: 2-page two-column NDA; correct order is clauses 1..8 down each column then across. Baseline interleaves across the gutter.

pos_two_column_unbalanced_last.expected_behavior: Two-column, left column full / right column half. Fix must read left column fully then right, without fabricating a right partner for the trailing left-only lines.

real_inbound_nda_sample.expected_behavior: The one real PDF in the repo: 1 page, single column, word-chunked, no tables. Extraction must stay byte-identical (no false-positive regression on a real document).
